economic_notes: TFN operates Widjikiwe Holdings Corp. (WHC), Widjikiwe L.P., TFN Construction L.P. (TFNCLP), and Widjikiwe Gas Bar L.P. (WGB). WGB has exclusive 10-year gasoline supply contract expiring November 2030 and exclusive merchandise supply contract expiring November 2027. WGB not properly accounted for by equity method due to inability to obtain data.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for three reasons: (1) failure to recognize asset retirement obligations under PS 3280; (2) Widjikiwe Gas Bar L.P. not accounted for using equity method due to inability to obtain data - amount of adjustment undetermined; (3) government transfer for policing infrastructure not recognized as receivable as at March 31, 2022 ($2,441,400), affecting comparability. Nation is located in Quebec. Council honoraries of $68,413 noted in expenses by object but no detailed remuneration schedule provided. Pension plan issue discovered post year-end regarding compulsory vs voluntary status - amount undetermined. ISC funding calculated as sum of four ISC contribution lines (Fixed + Block + Flexible + Set = $27,318,648). Total government transfers calculated from segment disclosure totals (Federal $31,573,690 + Provincial $2,546,332 = $34,120,022). OSR = total revenue $34,788,691 minus total government transfers $34,120,022 = $668,669. Salaries total from expenses by object: salaries $8,283,201 + fringe benefits $1,460,659 = $9,743,860. Annual debt service includes reimbursement of long-term debt $499,379 from cash flow statement.
